name: cc-harness
description: cc-harness — a layered harness for Claude Code: cc-config (the front desk — /cc-init onboarding, recommended rules, the cheat-sheet hook) sets it up; cc-instruments (philosophy-agnostic primitives: crux, slap, likec4/mermaid/excalidraw, cctreectl) + cc-script (the ground -> diverge -> decide -> build product script) are what you drive; cc-musician (the musician, one self-driving agent) runs them; cc-conductor (the ccconductorctl console) watches and controls many agents at once.

plugins.name: cc-config
plugins.description: The front desk: install, configure, and maintain the harness itself. /cc-init is the onboarding orchestrator — it explains the layers, installs missing dependencies and recommended tools, then runs three setup skills behind skip/stop gates: /rules-management (recommended + project rules), /cheatsheet-management (the reminder cheat-sheet a hook re-surfaces), /docs-management (find stale prose). Ships the recommended project rules and the cheat-sheet hook. Install this first.

plugins.name: cc-instruments
plugins.description: The primitives layer: philosophy-agnostic tools you reach for while working, usable in any project — /crux unwinds a pain or doubt into one diagnosis, /slap resets a stuck fix, /likec4 + /mermaid + /excalidraw draw architecture and sketches, and cctreectl maps the project tree. Zero-config.

plugins.name: cc-script
plugins.description: The product script: /roadmap-management grounds the North Star and charts a roadmap, /architect designs the architecture into diagrams (LikeC4 / Excalidraw / Mermaid), /what-to-do ranks where to go next, /how-to-do decides one fork, /do builds one task to a smoke-checked finish, /refactor-review-test hardens it and commits — a ground -> diverge -> decide -> build pipeline. Depends on cc-instruments.

plugins.name: cc-musician
plugins.description: The router layer: /musician is one entry point for any piece of work. It reads the goal (roadmap.md) and the design (architecture), sizes the task, and routes it — build-large / build-medium / build-small for code, or any cc-script/cc-instruments skill for the rest (architect, crux, slap, roadmap-management, what-to-do…). The router decides what; flags tune how — --auto acts without asking, --fast, --worktree, --ultracode. Runs in the conversation, no self-driving loop. Depends on cc-script and cc-instruments.

plugins.name: cc-conductor
plugins.description: The conductor layer: the ccconductorctl console observes and controls many coding agents and musicians at once (tokens, stalls, loops, stop/steer).
